name: Function
description: Describes a functional requirement: what the system shall do to or with something.

system.name: System
system.hint: What is the system called? e.g. application, service, module

action.name: Action
action.hint: What does the system do? e.g. validate, generate, send, display

object.name: Object
object.hint: What is acted upon? e.g. the user's email address, an invoice, search results

default.name: Function
default.description: A functional requirement describing what the system shall do.
default.example: The service shall send a confirmation email to the user after successful registration.
